commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=39f13a411f2f653f9e37cc0cbf5eba516387a277)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds node exec approval recovery wording under the CLI node invoke path and a focused assertion for the generated guidance string.

PR surface: Source +4, Tests +9. Total +13 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current main routes `host=node` shell execution through `executeNodeHostCommand`, which renders unavailable states through the shared approval reply payload, while this PR edits a CLI invoke path that now blocks `system.run`. I did not run a live node approval flow in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The PR needs contributor action for real behavior proof plus a branch/path refresh; automation should not take over an external PR while the contributor proof gate is still missing.

target.title: fix(cli): add exec approval recovery guidance (Fixes #53250)
target.body:
## Summary

Fixes #53250.

When `host=node` exec approval is required but no approval UI is available, the CLI currently fails with a generic error:

`exec denied: approval required (approval UI not available)`

That tells the operator something is wrong, but not what to do next. This patch makes the message actionable by naming two concrete recovery paths:
- open the Control UI with `openclaw dashboard --no-open`
- inspect pending approvals with `openclaw approvals get --node <node>`

## Tests and validation

```bash
./node_modules/.bin/vitest run src/cli/nodes-cli/register.invoke.nodes-run-approval-timeout.test.ts
git diff --check
```

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed:
- the node exec approval error should include actionable next steps instead of a dead-end “approval UI not available” message

Environment tested:
- local source checkout on this branch

Evidence after the fix:
- the thrown error string in `src/cli/nodes-cli/register.invoke.ts` now points to both the dashboard flow and the supported pending-approvals CLI

Observed result:
- users hitting this path now get concrete next steps in the error itself

What was not tested:
- a live node exec approval timeout/denial flow

## Risk

Low. This is a copy-only CLI error-message improvement with no behavior change in the approval flow itself.
target.author: deepujain

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
